message:
That adorable head tilt? 🐶 There's real science behind it. When you talk, your dog tilts their head to pinpoint exactly where the sound is coming from — and to see your face better past their own snout. Even sweeter: researchers found dogs tilt more for words they recognize, like their name or "walk." So that little tilt often means "I'm really listening to you." 🥹❤️

Tag a friend whose dog tilts at every word! 🐾
